title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including exploding token consumption, low productive spend ratios (18%), and potential circular investment dynamics. They cover Anthropic's valuation milestone, AI-enabled trading at Robinhood, and privacy risks from data collection for model training.
